app.title: Make some art with your phone sensors
app.author: adm4
app.description: Make art with your phone sensors
proposed_tests: Use Sensor Etch to create an interactive art piece and measure response time
Compare Sensor Etch with other similar tools for performance
Test Sensor Etch's ability to handle complex sensor inputs
